subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou knowest what lieth within my soul, my hidden mysteries, the secrets of mine inmost being, my recompense and my branches [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت تعلم ما فی نفسی و خفی اسراری و خفاء سرائری و جزای و فرعی و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
